prompt: My R-Ladies blog post draft is finished. How do I get it reviewed and scheduled so it publishes next Tuesday on the website?
assertions: Says to open a pull request (fork or push as website team)
Mentions CI checks: blog-lint and/or Lighthouse
Notes that body images must have alt text or CI fails
Says to set the frontmatter date to next Tuesday
Explains the merge-pending workflow auto-merges on the publication date
